title: Joakim Hykkerud

This biographical article related to Norwegian team handball is a [stub](/wiki/Wikipedia:Stub "Wikipedia:Stub"). You can help Wikipedia by [adding missing information](https://en.wikipedia.org/w/index.php?title=Joakim_Hykkerud&action=edit).

(born 10 February 1986) is a Norwegian [handball](/wiki/Handball "Handball") player for [Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold](/wiki/Lemvig-Thybor%C3%B8n_H%C3%A5ndbold "Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold") and the [Norwegian national team](/wiki/Norway_men%27s_national_handball_team "Norway men's national handball team").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

["Norges EM-lag"](https://www.handball.no/nyheter/norges-em-lag/) (in Norwegian). [Norwegian Handball Federation](/wiki/Norwegian_Handball_Federation "Norwegian Handball Federation"). Retrieved 23 January 2016.

["Men's EHF Euro 2016 Poland. Norway"](https://web.archive.org/web/20161214095030/http://pol2016.ehf-euro.com/teams/group-b-katowice/norway/). [European Handball Federation](/wiki/European_Handball_Federation "European Handball Federation"). Archived from [the original](http://pol2016.ehf-euro.com/teams/group-b-katowice/norway/) on 14 December 2016. Retrieved 23 January 2016.
["Joakim Hykkerud ny markedssjef"](https://www.miffotball.no/nyheter/joakim-hykkerud-ny-markedssjef) (in Norwegian). Mjøndalen IF. 20 March 2026. Retrieved 24 March 2026.

**Joakim André Groth Hykkerud** (born 10 February 1986) is a Norwegian [handball](/wiki/Handball "Handball") player for [Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold](/wiki/Lemvig-Thybor%C3%B8n_H%C3%A5ndbold "Lemvig-Thyborøn Håndbold") and the [Norwegian national team](/wiki/Norway_men%27s_national_handball_team "Norway men's national handball team").[[1]](#cite_note-1)

He competed at the [2016 European Men's Handball Championship](/wiki/2016_European_Men%27s_Handball_Championship "2016 European Men's Handball Championship").[[2]](#cite_note-2)[[3]](#cite_note-3)

In 2026 he was hired as marketing director of [Mjøndalen](/wiki/Mj%C3%B8ndalen_IF_Fotball "Mjøndalen IF Fotball")'s football team.[[4]](#cite_note-4)
